meta.summary: CPU-only GROMACS molecular dynamics simulation and analysis suite, including the gmx command-line tool, built-in force-field data, preparation commands, mdrun, and analysis subcommands.
meta.description: CPU-only GROMACS molecular dynamics simulation and analysis suite, including the gmx command-line tool, built-in force-field data, preparation commands, mdrun, and analysis subcommands.

test: gmx help commands | grep -F 'mdrun' >/dev/null && gmx help commands | grep -F 'pdb2gmx' >/dev/null && gmx mdrun -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'GROMACS' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gromacs-editconf && cd /tmp/taf-gromacs-editconf && printf 'Tiny water
    3
    1SOL     OW    1   0.000   0.000   0.000
    1SOL    HW1    2   0.095   0.000   0.000
    1SOL    HW2    3  -0.032   0.090   0.000
   1.00000   1.00000   1.00000
' > water.gro && gmx editconf -f water.gro -o water.pdb >/dev/null 2>&1 && grep -F 'ATOM' water.pdb >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gromacs-mdrun && cd /tmp/taf-gromacs-mdrun && printf 'Tiny water
    3
    1SOL     OW    1   0.000   0.000   0.000
    1SOL    HW1    2   0.095   0.000   0.000
    1SOL    HW2    3  -0.032   0.090   0.000
   1.00000   1.00000   1.00000
' > water.gro && printf '#include "oplsaa.ff/forcefield.itp"
#include "oplsaa.ff/tip3p.itp"

[ system ]
Tiny water

[ molecules ]
SOL 1
' > topol.top && printf 'integrator = md
nsteps = 0
dt = 0.001
nstlist = 1
cutoff-scheme = Verlet
rlist = 0.4
verlet-buffer-tolerance = -1
coulombtype = Cut-off
rcoulomb = 0.4
rvdw = 0.4
pbc = xyz
constraints = none
continuation = yes
' > mini.mdp && gmx grompp -f mini.mdp -c water.gro -p topol.top -o mini.tpr >/dev/null 2>&1 && test -s mini.tpr && gmx mdrun -deffnm mini -ntmpi 1 -ntomp 1 >/dev/null 2>&1 && test -s mini.log

upstream.name: GROMACS
upstream.citation: GROMACS development team 2026; Abraham et al. 2015
